column1: # HARD retrieval: zero content-token overlap with gold.
# Integrity (harness-enforced):
#  - string disjoint from train + easy + refuse
#  - max train seq similarity < 0.50
#  - max train content Jaccard < 0.25
#  - no same-id train distinctive token (len>=4)
#  - char n-gram coverage vs gold <= 0.15
